description_long: This object is a single, thick slice of rustic bread with a slightly irregular, oval shape and a golden-brown crust. The crust appears moderately thick and has a matte finish, with some darker toasted areas along the edge. The interior is pale beige, dotted with small air pockets and seeds, giving it a hearty, artisanal appearance. The surface of the bread is uneven, with visible dimples and a rough, porous texture typical of whole grain or seeded loaves. There are no visible branding marks, packaging, or labels on the bread. The slice looks fresh and soft, suitable for eating as-is or for use in sandwiches.
description: A thick, rustic slice of bread with a golden-brown crust and a porous, seeded interior. The surface is uneven and matte, with visible air pockets and seeds.
description_view_0: A wide, flat view showing the full oval shape, golden-brown crust, and dimpled, seeded surface.
description_view_1: A side angle highlighting the thickness of the slice and the contrast between the crust and the soft, airy interior.
description_view_2: A broad view emphasizing the length of the slice, the rough crust, and the porous, seeded crumb.
description_view_3: A narrow end view showing the rounded edge, crust thickness, and the distribution of seeds and air pockets inside.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is golden-brown with a slightly uneven, rustic texture and some darker toasted spots. There are no visible flour dustings or decorative scoring, but the edge is thick and rough, typical of artisanal bread.
